description: Expected verify + trust outcomes for each conformance fixture. Given the same .azp bytes and trust-keys.json, a conforming host MUST reproduce the SEMANTIC results: verify.ok, verify.signed, signatureValid, trust.trusted (and, when trusted, viaRegistryPublicKey). The `errors` / `reason` strings are the JS reference's diagnostics — hosts in other languages will word them differently and MAY reject at a different (earlier) stage, so match on the booleans, not on error text. Regenerated by `pnpm --filter @azphalt/conformance emit`; the conformance-fixtures CI job fails on any diff.

valid-asset.azp.description: A well-formed asset package (a .cube LUT). Integrity holds; unsigned.

valid-code-unsigned.azp.description: A well-formed code (filter) package. Integrity holds; unsigned.

signed-valid.azp.description: The valid asset package, Ed25519-signed by the conformance author key. Signature valid; the author key is not in the trust store.

trust.reason: signer key is not in the trust store

signed-tampered-manifest.azp.description: A signed package whose manifest.json was altered after signing — payload integrity holds, but the signature no longer verifies.

countersigned-1hop.azp.description: signed-valid, then counter-signed by the registry key (one hop). Trusted transitively via the registry in the trust store.

trust.reason: signer counter-signed by a trusted registry

unsafe-path.azp.description: Carries a payload path that escapes the package ('..'). A host must reject the unsafe path.

unlisted-payload.azp.description: Carries a payload file with no digest in manifest.files. A host must reject the unlisted entry.

errors: unlisted payload (no digest in manifest.files): extra.txt

trust.reason: invalid package: unlisted payload (no digest in manifest.files): extra.txt

digest-mismatch.azp.description: A payload file's bytes don't match its manifest.files digest. A host must reject it.

duplicate-entry.azp.description: Two ZIP entries share a name with different content (ZIP confusion). A hardened host must reject the archive.
